hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|ts|jsx|js|md|mdx)$' && cd /Users/jecdegois/ClaudeCode/05-arcade-vault && pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx|ts|jsx|js)$' && cd /Users/jecdegois/ClaudeCode/05-arcade-vault && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
